title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
feature: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Verify Device Home Screen displays Quick Settings based on user selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection, with counts updating from 3 to 2 to 1 to none when toggled on.
steps: Select 3 options in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection
Verify that 3 quick settings are shown on the Device Home Screen
Select 2 options in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection
Verify that 2 quick settings are shown on the Device Home Screen
Select 1 option in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection
Verify that 1 quick setting is shown on the Device Home Screen
Deselect all options while toggle is ON
Verify that no quick settings are displayed on the Device Home Screen
expected: The Device Home Screen displays Quick Settings based on user selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection. Specifically: 3 quick settings shown when 3 options selected, 2 quick settings shown when 2 options selected, 1 quick setting shown when 1 option selected, and no quick settings displayed when all options are deselected with toggle ON.
